title: Refund Policy
text: Customers may request a refund within thirty days of purchase. Refunds are issued to the original payment method.

title: Connection Errors
text: The error code ERR_CONN_4021 indicates the server refused the connection during the TLS handshake.

title: Shipping Times
text: Standard delivery takes five to seven business days. Express delivery arrives in two business days.

title: Account Security
text: Enable two-factor authentication to protect your account. Passwords must be at least twelve characters long.

title: Data Retention
text: Logs are kept for ninety days and then permanently deleted from all systems.

title: Rate Limits
text: The API allows one thousand requests per minute. Exceeding the limit returns a 429 status code.

title: Subscription Plans
text: The Pro tier includes priority support and unlimited projects. The Free tier is limited to three projects.

title: Password Reset
text: To reset a forgotten password, click the forgot-password link and follow the emailed instructions.
